name: class_union_strict_plus_lenient_two_successes_scored
description: M3a CLAIMED (scored pick_best): flat disjoint class union A{a int,b string} | B{c int,d string}, input carries ALL four fields with c="5" a numeric string. A succeeds (c,d extras => score 2); B succeeds via clean numeric-string int coercion (c="5"->5, a,b extras => score 2). Two successes tie on score 2, so pick_best picks the lower index (A, arm 0). Native now reproduces BAML's scored winner. want captured from live BAML final parse.
